BcJ0V9Vmp3o.title: 신창현 의원 더불어민주당_NATV 300인의 희망인터뷰
BcJ0V9Vmp3o.description: 1995년 민선 1기 의왕시장을 역임하며 ‘환경 시장’이라는 별칭을 얻었던 정치인 신창현. 청와대 환경비서관을 거쳐 중앙환경분쟁조정위원장, 국가인권위원회 조정위원, 갈등관리심의위원 등으로 일했으며, 20대 총선에서 41.36%의 득표율로 당선되며 다시 한 번 국민을 위해 일할 기회를 얻게 되었다. 서민들의 ‘먹고 사는 문제’를 해결하는 유능한 일꾼이 되고 싶다는 신창원 의원의 희망인터뷰.

PLh2143kYZM.title: 강훈식 의원 더불어민주당_NATV 300인의 희망인터뷰
PLh2143kYZM.description: 민주당 부대변인, 손학규 당대표 정무특별보좌관을 거쳐 TV 정치평론가로 인지도는 물론 능력을 검증받은 강훈식 의원. 삼 세 번의 국회 입성 도전 끝에 20대 총선에서 충남 아산시을 지역 국회의원에 당선됐다. 젊은 시선과 리더십으로 새로운 대한민국의 미래를 설계하겠다는 강훈식 의원을 만나본다.

8r_JKzXqXGw.title: [1968년 제작] 추억의 가수들이 뭉쳤다! '용사들 수고하십니다 2부'
8r_JKzXqXGw.description:
HD특선 다시보는 문화영화 '용사들 수고하십니다 2부'

1968년 서울시민회관에서 열린 파월장병 위문공연 실황
그시절 내로라 하는 최고 스타들이 꾸미는 1960년대의 화려한 무대!

HPA9_HIRJfw.title: [추억의 가수] 한번쯤은 따라해 봤을 현인의 '신라의 달밤'
HPA9_HIRJfw.description:
1968년 서울시민회관에서 열린 파월장병 위문공연 실황

Qj-ZofEOCwQ.title: 無토익, 無자격증 스펙없이 취업이 가능할까? (NCS정확히 알기)
Qj-ZofEOCwQ.description:
공공일자리를 잡아라! 한국산업인력공단 편.
-NCS 그것이 알고싶다.

NCS를 알아야 취업을 잡는다!
취업, NCS 정확히 알고 준비하자.

CwkuCZ68Tto.title: 2016 노인의 날 기념 전국 어르신들과의 오찬
CwkuCZ68Tto.description: 박근혜 대통령은 2016년 노인의 날을 맞아 전국 어르신들과의 오찬을 통해 오늘의 대한민국을 일구어낸 어르신들에게 존경과 감사의 뜻을 전했습니다.
tags: 2016 노인의 날 기념 전국 어르신들과의 오찬

3dMG-_JZxSM.title: 대통령 주재 수석비서관회의
3dMG-_JZxSM.description: 박근혜 대통령은 22일 수석비서관 회의를 주재해 북한 5차 핵실험과 경주 지진으로 인해 우리 안보와 경제가 모두 힘든 상황 속, 국정의 최고 책임자로서 위기극복과 민생안정에 최선을 다할 것이라 밝혔습니다.

wHh4zTvaLFs.title: 슈퍼맨 직업은 우편배달부?
wHh4zTvaLFs.description:
본업은 집배원
부업은 슈퍼맨?!

고흥군 농촌마을 어르신들에게
따끈따끈한 새 소식을 전하며

따듯한 마음과 사랑을 배달하는
집배원이 있다!

어르신들의 손과 발이 되어

곤경에 처한 어르신들을 
지키는 고흥 농촌마을 슈퍼맨!

고흥우체국 우편물류과 장 원 집배원  
KTV '철밥통은 가라'에서 만나보십시오

AmZ3n2pGudY.title: 창업, 이렇게 하자! 가족이 안심하고 사용하는 한류 '가습기'
AmZ3n2pGudY.description:
국내는 물론이고 미국, 중국, 일본 등 세계 각지에 가습기를 수출하며 '가습기 한류' 열풍을 일으키고 있는 (주)미로.
탄탄한 기술력을 바탕으로 글로벌 기업으로 한류열풍을 이끌고 있는 미로의 성공 창업노하우를 소개한다.

nacn3LAnhog.title: 창업, 이렇게 하자! 아트를 품은 가구
nacn3LAnhog.description:
대중에게 친근하게 다가갈 수 있는 예술 작품을 직접 제작, 기획전시하는 악트그룹의 하태웅 대표.
악트그룹은 2013년 정부선정지원기업으로 설립됐으며, 2014년 대통령 소속 국가지식위원회의 청년지식재산인상에서 '문화체육관광부 장관상'을 수상했다. 2013년 창업진흥원의 창업맞춤형사업을 통해 5천만원을 지원받은 하태웅 대표는 예술가구 제작을 위한 기반을 마련하며 문화예술 콘텐츠 개발을 위해 힘쓰고 있다.

2_HTpeoRsEw.title: 날개 돋친 '캡슐담배'…유해성분 검출돼도 '쉬쉬' [TV조선 단독]
2_HTpeoRsEw.description:
캡슐 담배라는게 유행하고 있습니다. 씹으면 달콤한 향이 나서 젊은이들에게 인기가 높습니다. 그런데 정부가 캡슐담배에 살충제 성분이 들어 있다는 보고서를 작성했다가 슬그머니 뺐습니다.

TV조선이 최근 착공된 신고리원전 5호, 6호기의 지질 분석 보고서를 단독 입수했습니다. 이 지역은 활성단층이 없다, 지진 위험이 없다, 이렇게 명시돼 있습니다. 이 엉터리 보고서만 믿고,, 원전이 허가된 겁니다.

lP536WvEs0o.title: [CNN Talk Asia] BiGBANG 10th anniversary interview ① 지드래곤(G-DRAGON)과 승리(Seungri)는 톰과 제리?
lP536WvEs0o.description:
JTBC 특별제휴사인 CNN이 10주년을 맞은 그룹 '빅뱅'을 인터뷰했습니다.  #빅뱅 #jtbc #CNN #talk_asia

Below subtitles only include the parts where you can't hear English at all.
Q1: How do you guys manage to do that and still look fun?(summarized question)
Taeyang: Of course we sometimes had hard times during the process of becoming a complete idol group 'Big Bang'. But we could get over those difficulties since we knew and liked each other "in person". 
We tried to make each other laugh and  so that we can be joyful all the time. We are at our happiest when all five members are together. And I think the way we thought of each other as lifelong companions could help us build intimate relationship for last 10 years and still. 

GD: We are members of 'Big Bang' and at the same time, we are brothers and families to each other.
Since we spent time together for a very long time, we could create special bond that can't be found in other boy bands.

Q2. What do you disagree on?(summarized question)
TOP: We never fought each other for last 10 years. There was no reason or situation we needed to go against each other.

Taeyang: What he meant by we have no reasons or issues to fight each other is that we are all straight shooters. We just say things out to each other right away whenever we think something went wrong or whenever we  need to talk out complaints towards each other. 
We tried hard to make each other comfortable when we knew what things hurt each other's feelings.
And I think that's our special tip to build stronger bond for 10 years.

Q3. Who’s the joker?(summarized question)
GD: I think TOP is joker. He's the oldest brother in our group, but he never played the peacock nor tried to act like a scary brother although Korea has more strict courtesy to respect older people than other countries.  Instead, he tried to make us comfortable, trying to get us to mediate as a big brother. So we didn't have any heavy atmosphere.

Taeyang: We actually don't have that kind of thing. We think of each other as friends so there's no such time for whom to be in charge. But as everyone knows, GD is the official leader of 'Big Bang', so he helps all of us make the right decision. Although we all have different thoughts when we need to make decisions, we usually ask GD to make the final decision and respect his decision.

Taeyang: Boss!
GD: Yes, sir!

Q4. Who’s the peacemaker?(summarized question)
GD: I think Taeyang plays the role of a peacemaker. He tries to get us to mediate whenever we have issues or troubles. He tries to solve all of Big Bang members' issues. He's very reliable and responsible person, trying to make us settle down by listening to any kinds of worries we, younger and older members have or fixing problems that can occur as a friend.

TOP: Taeyang's personality itself is a peacemaker.

Q5. Who’s ladies’ man?
GD: Well, I don't think Seungri is ladies man, but Daesung is.

Taeyang: To be frank, GD is the official ladies man, but Daesung is the king of ladies man in reality.

GD: He's a good player, not a playboy.

Daesung: Yeah, I won't deny his statement.

Q6. The relationship between GD and Seungri is ‘Tom and Jerry’?(summarized question)
GD: Well, I guess we look like Tom and Jerry. I encountered Seungri for the first time as the leader of Bigbang when he joined the group as the youngest member. I bother him a lot, and every time I do that, Seungri also tries to joke back to me or fight against me for fun. But the thing is, I feel like Seungri always win at the end.

Taeyang: You know that Jerry always beat Tom in 'Tom and Jerry' cartoon, right? Although Tom always bother Jerry, Jerry always win. And the way GD and Seungri fight are like that, so I think that's why people say that their relationship is like 'Tom and Jerry'.

Seungri: Yeah, I agree with them.

0atYy6zjgYk.title: [CNN Talk Asia] BiGBANG 10th anniversary interview ② 한국선 30살이 되기 전 군대를 의무적으로 가야하는데…
0atYy6zjgYk.description:
JTBC 특별제휴사인 CNN이 10주년을 맞은 그룹 '빅뱅'을 인터뷰했습니다. #빅뱅 #jtbc #CNN #talk_asia

Below subtitles only include the parts where you can't hear English at all.
Q1. Mandatory Military service and future plans of Big Bang(summarized question)
Taeyang: Yes, we always ponder on how we would live for next 10 years every time we, 5 members all gather together. We try to ask as many questions as we can about each other's future plans including mandatory military services. Of course we have so many challenges and obligations waiting for us, and we will take them for granted.
While this is one thing, another thing we ponder on is the way we have been doing, showing our fans how 'Big Bang' gets better everyday and how we will improve in next 10 years with what kind of image. Since we want to fill our next 10 years with more fabulous ways, many of our fans and the public as a whole seem to worry a lot about the future of 'Big Bang'. 
But we actually never worried about this problem, but we rather enjoyed thinking about it. We just enjoy what we do, what we will do and we are excited to wait for our next 10 years.
Every day, our hearts go pit-a-pat, because we all have confidence and dream for the upcoming future.

Q2. Do you feel more pressure than others as you are the oldest, TOP?(summarized question)
TOP: Actually, so many people do ask questions to me if I feel the most pressure about the future of Big Bang, but I am kind of person who leaves something to fate. I don't fear or worry about what would happen if I disappear temporarily, but I rather just do my best and do my current job patiently. And I try to spend time in positive ways, thinking to myself, 'I will start in a brand new way again after I come back.'

GD: When I see TOP or other members, for instance, if they are not confident with themselves, they would get nervous about their future, but they all exactly know what they need to do right now and will do in the future, they don't feel pressure about that kind of thing.

TOP: So I mean, I don't really fear nor get nervous about the future of 'Big Bang'.

Q3. Are we coming to the end of Big Bang?(summarized question)
Taeyang: Of course no, not at all.

TOP: It'a rather a Big Bang's 10-year-long historical record. 

Taeyang: It's meaningful to celebrate ourselves, commemorating 10th anniversary of the 'Big Bang'. And lots of fans have been cheering us for about 10 years. So we want to enjoy sharing this moment with those fans who stayed next to us for 10 years and we also want them to expect a lot for our next 10 years as well. If the end of 'Big Bang' has already come, we would not do interview with you like this, putting very bright smiles on our faces.

YPmBSz78ykc.title: [CNN Talk Asia] BiGBANG 10th anniversary interview ③ "우리끼리 만든 추억이 많고, 그 기억을 하면 더 행복해"
YPmBSz78ykc.description:
JTBC 특별제휴사인 CNN이 10주년을 맞은 그룹 '빅뱅'을 인터뷰했습니다. #빅뱅 #jtbc #CNN #talk_asia
Below subtitles only include the parts where you can't hear English at all.
Q1. What it takes to be a Korean pop-star? You have 12-hour training a day? True? (Summarized question)
GD: I mean not only 12 hours, but almost like most of the whole day.
Well, I don't know. Since we never received training with the system of foreign countries, so I am not sure, but Korean entertainment companies already set out harsh and systematic training for idol trainees. And so we, for instance, needed to fit that system anyways to be the real idol group member. We weren't in good conditions to fix the system and think of building up new plans or training systems.

Taeyang: We can be called as lucky guys since we could follow what our senior singers or senior idol groups(seonbaeneem) had already done. 
Sometimes, there were moments when we yearned for learning things such as singing and dancing techniques in an environment where nothing was given.
But on one hand, when I see the training methods that current entertainment companies use to idol trainees, I actually do worry if that systematic and mechanical training will really teach something to them or help them develop into a leading idol group in the future.

Q2. How intense was your training?(Summarized question)
Daesung: Umm..well..actually the training was so harsh at the first time. But I thought I would find my real style later on if I can successfully learn the basics and finish this brutal training. I think an idol trainee can then really, eventually know how to express feelings and get the ability to be professional idol group member after going through harsh training.
I advise one not to try hard to express one's feelings from the beginning of the training. Instead, one should learn it slowly so that one exactly knows what one enjoys. In that way, that idol trainee will find the her/ his own specific color.
So on one hand, I also worry about Korean training's degree of harshness for idol trainees, but on the other hand, I think there are positive aspects about this system as I said previously.

GD: He was smiling all the time when he was getting training. I don't know why,but he was always smiling.

Q3. How did you cope with the pressure?(Summarized question)
GD: I think I just enjoyed the feeling pressure. I never thought of my situation as a competition and beating someone. I was in a hurry receiving lessons and I didn't have any time to look back. I continuously ran forward. Everyday, I was busy learning and practicing to achieve my dream, I jus did what I needed to do no matter what.

Taeyang: If I was old enough at that time, I would have complained and thought that training is too tiring and brutal. But I was only a 13-year-old boy so I thought of the training as something I can of course do, taking things as chances and finished the training bravely.

GD: And we really wanted to be singers.

Q4.Did you have moments when you thought ‘This is not going to happen’?(Summarized question)
Taeyang: Well, to be frank, we can't say that we weren't nervous about our future. There was a survival audition right before to test our abilities for the last time to make our first debut as 'Big Bang'. 
I and GD have practiced a lot to become an idol group for a very long time, but YG Entertainment’s boss and big bro, Yang Hyun-suk always added a condition that we both won't pass if we don't do well no matter how much we practice. And I was worrying if I needed to return back to home since I couldn't debut as a singer right away although I had a long training period. So I just did my best everyday until I make my first debut as 'Big Bang', thinking to myself 'Now or never'.

Q5. Did you have any worries that it’s not gonna happen?(Summarized question)
Seungri: In my case, I narrowly passed the survival audition and clinched the last spot of 'Big Bang'.
So I think I really did my best everyday, thinking about an urgency and tension of the competition.

Q6. Do you have any regrets that you couldn’t spend your childhood or teenage years well?(Summarized question)
TOP: Well, we got into music when we were very young and started this career at an early age. So we don't really have a lot of memories about schools since we were busy practicing stuff in YG and we couldn't play often with friends like other ordinary people.
But, I have more memories with Big Bang family than the memories I have with my ordinary friends. We have special memories that only five of us can know. So when I reminisce those delightful memories, I am pleased as punch.
